inputs.label: Systolic Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Maximum arterial pressure during left ventricular contraction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum arterial pressure during left ventricular contraction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sol ventrikül kasılması sırasında maksimum arter basıncı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximaler arterieller Druck während der Kontraktion der linken Herzkammer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression artérielle maximale pendant la contraction ventriculaire gauche.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión arterial máxima durante la contracción del ventrículo izquierdo.

inputs.label: Diastolic Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Minimum arterial pressure during ventricular relaxation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum arterial pressure during ventricular relaxation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ventriküler gevşeme sırasında minimum arter basıncı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Minimaler arterieller Druck während der Erschlaffung der Herzkammer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression artérielle minimale pendant la relaxation ventriculaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión arterial mínima durante la relajación ventricular.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de battements cardiaques par minute.

inputs.label: Rest Duration
inputs.businessContext: Minutes of rest before measurement to ensure accurate reading.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minutes of rest before measurement to ensure accurate reading.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğru ölçüm için ölçüm öncesi dinlenme dakikası.
businessContext_i18n.de: Minuten Ruhe vor der Messung, um eine genaue Messung zu gewährleisten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Minutes de repos avant la mesure pour garantir une lecture précise.
businessContext_i18n.es: Minutos de reposo antes de la medición para asegurar una lectura precisa.
